run.usage_instructions: Use `thunderbit distill run` to run Thunderbit's Markdown distillation endpoint. URL is required and identifies absolute url to distill. --table/-t Display as table. --properties/-p Comma-separated fields to include (supports dot-notation).

distill.usage_instructions: Use `thunderbit distill` for distill web pages into markdown. Main actions: `distill run`.

extract.help: Extract structured JSON from web pages

options.name: --schema-file
options.help: Path to a JSON Schema file

run.usage_instructions: Use `thunderbit extract run` to run Thunderbit's structured extraction endpoint. URL is required and identifies absolute url to extract from. --schema-file Path to a JSON Schema file. --table/-t Display as table.

extract.usage_instructions: Use `thunderbit extract` for extract structured json from web pages. Main actions: `extract run`.

login.help: Configure authentication credentials. Prompts for required credentials based on the tool's authentication type. For OAuth authorization code flows, opens a browser for user consent.

options.name: --profile
options.help: Profile name to save credentials to

login.usage_instructions: Use `thunderbit auth login` to configure authentication credentials. Prompts for required credentials based on the tool's authentication type. For OAuth authorization code flows, opens a browser for user consent. --profile/-p Profile name to save credentials to. --force/-F Clear existing credentials and re-authenticate.

logout.help: Clear stored credentials and browser sessions.

options.name: --profile
options.help: Profile name to clear credentials from

logout.usage_instructions: Use `thunderbit auth logout` to clear stored credentials and browser sessions. --profile/-p Profile name to clear credentials from.

options.name: --profile
options.help: Profile name to check (defaults to all profiles)

status.usage_instructions: Use `thunderbit auth status` to check authentication status across profiles. --profile/-p Profile name to check (defaults to all profiles). --table/-t Display as table.

refresh.help: Refresh OAuth access token using stored refresh token.
refresh.usage_instructions: Use `thunderbit auth refresh` to refresh OAuth access token using stored refresh token. --profile/-p Profile name. --table/-t Display as table.

test.help: Test authentication by verifying credentials work across profiles.
test.usage_instructions: Use `thunderbit auth test` to test authentication by verifying credentials work across profiles. --table/-t Display as table. --verbose/-v Show detailed checks.

list.help: List all profiles and show which is the default.

options.name: --limit
options.help: Maximum number of profiles to return

options.name: --properties
options.help: Comma-separated list of fields to include

list.usage_instructions: Use `thunderbit auth profiles list` to list all profiles and show which is the default. --table/-t Display as table. --limit/-l Maximum number of profiles to return.

get.help: Get details for a specific profile.

arguments.name: name
arguments.help: Profile name to get details for

get.usage_instructions: Use `thunderbit auth profiles get` to get details for a specific profile. NAME is required and identifies profile name to get details for. --table/-t Display as table.

create.help: Create a new profile from .env.example template.
create.usage_instructions: Use `thunderbit auth profiles create` to create a new profile from .env.example template. NAME is required and identifies profile name (e.g., staging, production).

set-default.help: Set a profile as the default (IS_DEFAULT_PROFILE=1).

arguments.name: name
arguments.help: Profile name to set as default

set-default.usage_instructions: Use `thunderbit auth profiles set-default` to set a profile as the default (IS_DEFAULT_PROFILE=1). NAME is required and identifies profile name to set as default.

delete.help: Delete a profile and its data.
delete.usage_instructions: Use `thunderbit auth profiles delete` to delete a profile and its data. NAME is required and identifies profile name to delete. --force/-F Skip confirmation.

profiles.usage_instructions: Use `thunderbit auth profiles` for manage authentication profiles. Main actions: `auth profiles list`, `auth profiles get`, `auth profiles create`, `auth profiles set-default`, `auth profiles delete`.

auth.usage_instructions: Use `thunderbit auth` for manage thunderbit authentication. Main actions: `auth login`, `auth logout`, `auth status`, `auth refresh`, `auth test`, `auth profiles`.

clear.help: Remove all cached responses. Deletes every file in the cache directory ({storage_dir}/cache/) and reports how many files and bytes were freed.
clear.usage_instructions: Use `thunderbit cache clear` to remove all cached responses. Deletes every file in the cache directory ({storage_dir}/cache/) and reports how many files and bytes were freed.

cache.usage_instructions: Use `thunderbit cache` for manage response cache. Main actions: `cache clear`.

usage_instructions: Use `thunderbit` for cLI interface for Thunderbit API. Commands follow `thunderbit <command-group> <action>`. Primary groups are distill, extract, auth, cache.
